tluaDottedFunctionNestedChains.tlua(17,18): error TLUA2339: Property 'nested' does not exist on type 'number'.


==== tluaDottedFunctionNestedChains.tlua (1 errors) ====
    local a = { b = {} };
    
    function a.b.deep(x: number): number
      return x;
    end
    
    local viaChain = a.b.deep(1);
    
    local outer = {};
    
    function outer.mid(): void
    end
    
    // The intermediate link is a function, not a table, so it cannot be extended.
    local host = { fn = 0 };
    
    function host.fn.nested(): void
                     ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'nested' does not exist on type 'number'.
    end
